subcodes.first_line: Though long hath it been since any breeze of loving-kindness from thy direction hath wafted o'er the heart of this lowly one, and the pen [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: اگرچه مدتها است که هبوب عنایتی از شطر آنجناب بر قلب این مسکین نوزیده و قلم
subcodes.subjects: @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God, @honesty; truthfulness; trustworthiness, @teaching the Cause; call to teach, @heedlessness and ignorance of the people, @expressions of grief; lamentation; sadness, @love, unity, and fellowship among the friends; in the Cause
